title: Add comment section to blog posts and image upload for blog posts

requirements.text: Add a comment section at the bottom of each blog post detail page that allows users to view and share comments

quotes: share your comment section in bottom of blog post part

acceptanceCriteria: Comment section appears below the blog post content on BlogPostDetailPage
Users can submit new comments with their name and comment text
All comments for a post are displayed in chronological order

requirements.text: Add image upload capability to the blog post creation and editing forms, allowing authors to upload custom images instead of using image descriptions

quotes: add image including option in blog post section

acceptanceCriteria: CreateBlogPostPage includes an image upload input field
EditBlogPostPage includes an image upload input field with current image preview
Uploaded images are stored and retrievable from the backend
Blog posts display the uploaded images on the detail page and in post cards

requirements.text: Update the backend BlogPost data model to support storing comments with author name, comment text, and timestamp
acceptanceCriteria: BlogPost type includes a comments array field
Backend provides methods to add comments to a post
Backend provides methods to retrieve all comments for a post
Comments are returned with the blog post data

requirements.text: Update the backend to handle image file uploads and storage for blog posts
acceptanceCriteria: Backend accepts image file uploads via HTTP
Uploaded images are stored as assets accessible via URL
BlogPost type stores the uploaded image URL or asset ID
Image retrieval methods return the correct image for each post

constraints: Maintain the single-actor architecture in backend/main.mo
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or components/ui
Keep existing blog post CRUD functionality intact
nonGoals: User authentication for commenting (anonymous commenting is acceptable)
